---
title: "Linear Regression: Psychological Factors & Physical Activity"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

```{r load-packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(corrplot)
library(foreign)
library(car)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(performance)
library(stargazer)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r load-data}
pa_data_raw <- read.spss("/Users/tim/Desktop/R Files/PFP/PA_Data.sav", to.data.frame = TRUE)

pa_data_raw$Group[pa_data_raw$Group == "1"] <- "PFP"
pa_data_raw$Group[pa_data_raw$Group == "0"] <- "Healthy"

pfp_data <- pa_data_raw %>%
  select(Group, Age, Sex, Mass, Height, BMI, PSEQ, AKPS, KOOS_PF, PCS, Steps, MVPA) %>%
  filter(Group == "PFP")

cor_data <- pfp_data %>%
  select(Age, Mass, Height, BMI, PSEQ, AKPS, KOOS_PF, PCS, MVPA, Steps)
```

## Descriptive Statistics

```{r demographics-table}
table_data <- pfp_data %>%
  select(Age, Mass, Height, BMI, AKPS, PSEQ, PCS, Steps, MVPA)

table_data %>%
  tbl_summary(
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
    digits = everything() ~ 1,
    label = list(
      Age ~ "Age (yrs)",
      Mass ~ "Mass (kg)",
      Height ~ "Height (m)",
      BMI ~ "BMI (kg/m²)",
      AKPS ~ "AKPS",
      PSEQ ~ "PSEQ",
      PCS ~ "PCS",
      MVPA ~ "MVPA (min/day)",
      Steps ~ "Steps (per day)"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label = "**Variable**") %>%
  modify_caption("**Table 1: Subject Demographics**") %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  cols_width(label ~ px(175))
```

## Aim 1: Correlation Analysis

```{r correlation-matrix, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
corrplot(cor(cor_data, use = "complete.obs"),
         addCoef.col = "black",
         method = "circle",
         number.digits = 2,
         tl.col = "black")
```

```{r correlation-tests, results='asis'}
cor_results <- data.frame(
  Comparison = c("PSEQ ~ Steps", "PSEQ ~ MVPA", "PCS ~ Steps", "PCS ~ MVPA", 
                 "PSEQ ~ PCS", "PSEQ ~ KOOS_PF", "PCS ~ KOOS_PF"),
  rho = c(
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$Steps, method = "spearman")$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$MVPA, method = "spearman")$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$Steps)$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$MVPA)$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$PSEQ)$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$KOOS_PF)$estimate,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$KOOS_PF)$estimate
  ),
  p_value = c(
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$Steps, method = "spearman")$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$MVPA, method = "spearman")$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$Steps)$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$MVPA)$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$PSEQ)$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PSEQ, pfp_data$KOOS_PF)$p.value,
    cor.test(pfp_data$PCS, pfp_data$KOOS_PF)$p.value
  )
)

cor_results %>%
  mutate(
    rho = round(rho, 2),
    p_value = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "<.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value))
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(Comparison = "Comparison", rho = "ρ", p_value = "p") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Correlation Results")
```

## Aim 2: Linear Regression

### Steps ~ PSEQ

```{r lm-steps, fig.height=8}
lm_steps <- lm(Steps ~ PSEQ, data = pfp_data)

summary(lm_steps)
cat("\n")
car::Anova(lm_steps)

performance::check_model(lm_steps)
```

### MVPA ~ PSEQ

```{r lm-mvpa, fig.height=8}
lm_mvpa <- lm(MVPA ~ PSEQ, data = pfp_data)

summary(lm_mvpa)
cat("\n")
car::Anova(lm_mvpa)

performance::check_model(lm_mvpa)
```

### Regression Summary

```{r regression-table, results='asis'}
stargazer(lm_steps, lm_mvpa, type = "html",
          dep.var.labels = c("Steps", "MVPA"),
          covariate.labels = "PSEQ",
          title = "Regression Results")
```

**Key Findings:**

- Steps ~ PSEQ: F(1,36) = 8.22, p = .006, Adjusted R² = .19
- MVPA ~ PSEQ: F(1,36) = 6.38, p = .016, Adjusted R² = .15

## Figure

```{r figure, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
plot_data <- pfp_data %>%
  select(PSEQ, PCS, Steps, MVPA) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PSEQ, PCS), names_to = "Scale", values_to = "Score") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Steps, MVPA), names_to = "PA", values_to = "Value")

plot_data$Scale <- factor(plot_data$Scale, levels = c("PSEQ", "PCS"))
plot_data$PA <- factor(plot_data$PA, levels = c("Steps", "MVPA"))

pa_labels <- c(Steps = "Steps (per day)", MVPA = "MVPA (min/day)")

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Score, y = Value, color = Scale, shape = Scale)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(PA ~ Scale, scales = "free", labeller = labeller(PA = pa_labels)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(PSEQ = "#E4002B", PCS = "#1B2E67")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(PSEQ = 16, PCS = 17)) +
  labs(
    x = "Psychological Scale Score",
    y = NULL,
    caption = "MVPA, moderate-to-vigorous physical activity; PSEQ, pain self-efficacy questionnaire; PCS, pain catastrophizing scale"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 9)
  )
```
